tasks.prompt:
Monitor the UQ-AV K=1 training process and report results to the user. Check:
1. Whether training processes are still running (ps aux | grep train-uq-av)
2. GPU utilization and memory (nvidia-smi)
3. Latest checkpoint file (ls -lt checkpoints/uq_av_k1/*.pth.tar)
4. TensorBoard events file size (ls -la checkpoints/uq_av_k1/events/)
5. Process uptime and CPU usage

Summarize the training progress clearly in Chinese. If training has stopped or crashed, report that immediately.
